title: Sweet Portuguese Seed Stir Fry
description: A delicious and unique stir fry dish that combines the flavors of Portugal with the crunch of seeds.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the diced onion and red bell pepper and stir-fry until tender.
Add the diced sweet potatoes and stir-fry for an additional 2-3 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the sweet stir-fry sauce and a pinch of salt and black pepper.
Add the sauce to the skillet and stir-fry for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sweet potatoes are coated.
Sprinkle the poppy seeds over the top and stir-fry for an additional 30 seconds.
